senior.title: [dogfood] git commit Bash tool calls blocked by hook even when decision is 'allowed'
senior.note: Fix in apps/cli/src/commands/claude-hook.ts: route allow-path messages to stdout; reserve stderr for deny/violation/errors. Claude Code PreToolUse protocol treats any stderr as blocking regardless of exit code.
